productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Black Casual Shoes
description: These sneaker inspired leather shoes from red tape are a great combination of style and features. The full grain leather lends it a natural finish, while the sneaker silhouette gives it a preppy vibe. Team this pair with chinos or jeans and shirts.UpperFull-grain leather and suede upper for absolute comfort, durability and stylePerforations and eyelets on the sides for greater breathabilityLace-ups for snug FitFabric inner lining for ultimate breathabilityCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortLightly padded, textile covered footbed for comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with textured grooves in a circular pattern for greater gripPivot point on the big toe mound for easy 180 degree movementFlex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet shoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
